query:
ALTER TABLE material_inspection_records 
ADD COLUMN appearance VARCHAR(200) AFTER supplier_name,
ADD COLUMN odor VARCHAR(200) AFTER appearance,
ADD COLUMN color VARCHAR(100) AFTER odor,
ADD COLUMN temperature DECIMAL(5,2) AFTER color,
ADD COLUMN result ENUM('pass', 'fail', 'conditional') AFTER temperature;
